creator: crum.zach@gmail.com
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/releases/10.1R/schedule.html
"RC4 builds begin *	29 October 2014	30 October 2014	Fourth release candidate."

would indicate it's ready for consumption, plus the files are available off the ftp server.

Both make it "officialish" for me. 

I've submitted a couple of vt terminal issues and was intending to test them against RC4. If they continue to be an issue, I intended to update them.

Why now? Well, it's easier to do an upgrade on Saturday and Sunday than during the week.
